Home.SH00TM3P1Z(SMPZ)가 제작한 Enhanced Dogtags 모: Documentation for all dogtag-related settings in the Enhanced Dogtags mod by SH00TM3P1Z (SMPZ).
Home.> **실시간 동기화:** 모든 독택 설정(DogtagSettings,: > **Real-time Sync:** All dogtag settings (DogtagSettings, AIDogtagSettings, DogtagTradeSettings, category JSON files, etc.) are **applied to the server in real-time when files are saved**, so no server restart is required for configuration changes.
All config files are stored relative to the server profile folder.
Home.| `$profile:EnhancedDogtag\\Config\\Dogt: | `$profile:EnhancedDogtag\Config\DogtagSettings.json` | Dogtag base settings (looting, Death Wish, etc.) |
Home.| `$profile:EnhancedDogtag\\Data\\Dogtag: | `$profile:EnhancedDogtag\Data\DogtagLifetime.json` | Dogtag lifetime data (auto-generated, manual edit not recommended) |
Home.> **참고:** `$profile:`은 DayZ 서버 프로필 경로입니다: > **Note:** `$profile:` refers to the DayZ server profile path. (e.g., `DayZServer\Profiles\`)
Home.`SMPZ Mod Manager`가 설치되어 있다면, **어드민 권한**: If `SMPZ Mod Manager` is installed, admins can change all dogtag settings in-game through the mod manager menu.

DogtagSettings.독택 시스템의 기본 동작(루팅, 데스 위시, 표시 옵션 등)을 정의하는: This config file defines the base dogtag behavior (looting, Death Wish, display options, etc.). It is **separate from dogtag trade** and controls how the dogtag item itself works.

DogtagSettings.| `DisableSuicideDogtagLooting` | bool |: | `DisableSuicideDogtagLooting` | bool | false | Disable dogtag looting on suicide |
DogtagSettings.| `EnableDogtagRespawnDelay` | bool | fa: | `EnableDogtagRespawnDelay` | bool | false | Enable dogtag looting delay after respawn |
DogtagSettings.| `DogtagRespawnDelaySeconds` | int | 30: | `DogtagRespawnDelaySeconds` | int | 300 | Delay in seconds before dogtag can be looted after spawn |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowPlayerKills` | bool | true | 플레이어: | `ShowPlayerKills` | bool | true | Show player kill count |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowAIKills` | bool | true | AI 킬 수 표: | `ShowAIKills` | bool | true | Show AI kill count |
DogtagSettings.| `KeepKillCountsOnDeath` | bool | true: | `KeepKillCountsOnDeath` | bool | true | Keep kill count on death |
DogtagSettings.**AllowDogtagLooting:** false로 두면 아무도 시체: **AllowDogtagLooting:** If false, no one can loot dogtags from corpses. If true, looting is allowed when other conditions are met.
DogtagSettings.**DisableSuicideDogtagLooting:** true면 자: **DisableSuicideDogtagLooting:** If true, dogtags from players who died by suicide can never be looted. If false, suicide dogtags can be looted (subject to other conditions).
DogtagSettings.**EnableDogtagRespawnDelay / DogtagRespa: **EnableDogtagRespawnDelay / DogtagRespawnDelaySeconds:** Only applies to suicide deaths. If true, the dogtag can only be looted after the specified seconds (default 300, 5 minutes) have passed since death. If false, suicide dogtags can be looted immediately.
DogtagSettings.**ShowPlayerKills, ShowAIKills:** 독택 아이템: **ShowPlayerKills, ShowAIKills:** Toggle display of player kill count and AI kill count on the dogtag item.
DogtagSettings.**DistanceUnit:** 0이면 미터(m), 1이면 야드(yd)로: **DistanceUnit:** 0 = meters (m), 1 = yards (yd) for distance display on the player's death dogtag info.
DogtagSettings.**KeepKillCountsOnDeath:** true면 사망 시 이전: **KeepKillCountsOnDeath:** If true, kill counts from the previous life are saved to DogtagLifetime.json and applied to the new dogtag. If false, kill counts are reset on death.
DogtagSettings.| `DeathWishEnabled` | bool | true | 데스: | `DeathWishEnabled` | bool | true | Enable Death Wish feature |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowLifetimeToDeathWish` | bool | tru: | `ShowLifetimeToDeathWish` | bool | true | Show survival time to Death Wish |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowPlayerKillsToDeathWish` | bool |: | `ShowPlayerKillsToDeathWish` | bool | true | Show player kills to Death Wish |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowAIKillsToDeathWish` | bool | true: | `ShowAIKillsToDeathWish` | bool | true | Show AI kills to Death Wish |
DogtagSettings.| `DeathWishConditionType` | int | 0 | 데: | `DeathWishConditionType` | int | 0 | Death Wish kill condition type (0 = player and AI, 1 = player, 2 = AI) |
DogtagSettings.| `KeepDeathWishOnDeath` | bool | true |: | `KeepDeathWishOnDeath` | bool | true | Keep Death Wish level on death |
DogtagSettings.| `ShowSpecialPhrase` | int | 1 | 데스 위시: | `ShowSpecialPhrase` | int | 1 | Death Wish special phrase display mode |
DogtagSettings.| `DeathWishRespawnEnabled` | bool | tru: | `DeathWishRespawnEnabled` | bool | true | Enable Death Wish respawn (respawn at last death location) |
DogtagSettings.**DeathWishConditionType:** 데스 위시 레벨 업에: **DeathWishConditionType:** Kill condition required for Death Wish level up.
DogtagSettings.- 0: 플레이어 킬 수와 AI 킬 수 둘 다 목표치를 채워야 레벨 업: - 0: Both player kills and AI kills must meet the target
DogtagSettings.- 1: 플레이어 킬 수만 목표치를 채우면 레벨 업 (AI 킬은 무시): - 1: Only player kills must meet the target (AI kills ignored)
DogtagSettings.- 2: AI 킬 수만 목표치를 채우면 레벨 업 (플레이어 킬은 무시): - 2: Only AI kills must meet the target (player kills ignored)
DogtagSettings.**KeepDeathWishOnDeath:** true면 사망 후 리스폰: **KeepDeathWishOnDeath:** If true, Death Wish level is preserved after death and respawn. Stored in DogtagLifetime.json.
DogtagSettings.**DeathWishRespawnEnabled:** true면 데스 위시: **DeathWishRespawnEnabled:** If true, respawn chance at last death location is applied based on Death Wish level. Uses DeathWishRespawnSettings probabilities.
DogtagSettings.모든 시간 값은 **초 단위**입니다. (예: 21600은 6시간): All time values are in **seconds**. (e.g., 21600 = 6 hours)

Level-specific times are the survival time needed to reach the next level. Kill conditions (based on DeathWishConditionType) must also be met along with time.

DogtagSettings.데스 위시 리스폰 시스템으로, 각 데스 위시 레벨별 마지막 사망 위치로: Respawn chance (%) at last death location per Death Wish level.
DogtagSettings.**동작:** 사망 시 0에서 99 사이의 난수가 생성되고, 해당 레벨의: **Behavior:** On death, a random value from 0 to 99 is generated. If it is less than the level's chance, the player respawns at last death location. E.g., DeathWishRespawnChance3 of 50 means 50% respawn chance. 100 means always respawn.

DogtagSettings.`독택 거래 상점 시스템`을 사용하려면 `DogtagSettings.js: `DogtagEnabled` in DogtagSettings.json must be `true` to use the dogtag trade shop system.

AIDogtagSettings.AI가 독택을 소지할 수 있는지, AI 독택을 루팅할 수 있는지를 제어하: Config file that controls whether AI can carry dogtags and whether AI dogtags can be looted.
AIDogtagSettings.| `Version` | int | 2 | 설정 버전 (수정 권장하지 않: | `Version` | int | 2 | Config version (not recommended to modify) |
AIDogtagSettings.| `AIDogtagEnabled` | bool | true | AI 독: | `AIDogtagEnabled` | bool | true | Enable AI dogtags (whether AI can carry dogtags) |
AIDogtagSettings.| `AIDogtagLootingEnabled` | bool | true: | `AIDogtagLootingEnabled` | bool | true | Allow AI dogtag looting (whether dogtags can be looted from AI corpses) |
AIDogtagSettings.**AIDogtagEnabled:** false면 AI가 독택을 소지하지: **AIDogtagEnabled:** If false, AI do not carry dogtags. No dogtags drop from AI corpses.
AIDogtagSettings.**AIDogtagLootingEnabled:** false면 AI 시체: **AIDogtagLootingEnabled:** If false, players cannot loot dogtags from AI corpses even if they exist. Looting is blocked even when AIDogtagEnabled is true.
AIDogtagSettings.두 설정 모두 true여야 AI 독택을 얻을 수 있고, 독택 거래에서 A: Both settings must be true to obtain AI dogtags and use them in dogtag trade.
AIDogtagSettings.| **DogtagSettings.json** | 플레이어 독택 기본 동: | **DogtagSettings.json** | Player dogtag base behavior (looting, Death Wish, etc.) |
AIDogtagSettings.AI 독택은 거래 시스템에서 사용 가능합니다. [거래 조건 (TradeC: AI dogtags can be used in the trade system. Used together with the `AIDogtag` settings in [Trade Conditions (TradeConditions)](TradeConditions).

DogtagTradeSettings.거래 가능 여부는 **서버 기준**으로 판단됩니다. `IsTradeEna: Trade availability is determined **server-side**. If `IsTradeEnabled()` returns false, trade is fully blocked.
DogtagTradeSettings.- **false:** 날짜 제한 없음. `StartDate`, `End: - **false:** No date restriction. `StartDate` and `EndDate` are ignored.
DogtagTradeSettings.- **true:** `StartDate`~`EndDate` 범위 내에서: - **true:** Trade only allowed within `StartDate` to `EndDate` range.
DogtagTradeSettings.- `StartDate`만 있으면: 현재 날짜가 시작일과 같거나 그: - StartDate only: Trade allowed when current date is on or after start date
DogtagTradeSettings.- `EndDate`만 있으면: 현재 날짜가 종료일과 같거나 그 이전: - EndDate only: Trade allowed when current date is on or before end date
DogtagTradeSettings.- 둘 다 있으면: 현재 날짜가 시작일과 종료일 사이(둘 다 포함)일: - Both: Trade allowed when current date is between start and end (inclusive)
DogtagTradeSettings.- 둘 다 비어 있으면: 날짜 제한 없음 (UseDateRange가: - Both empty: No date restriction (even with UseDateRange true)
DogtagTradeSettings.- `StartDate`, `EndDate`, `UseWeekendOnl: - Timezone used for **date/day-of-week calculation** for `StartDate`, `EndDate`, and `UseWeekendOnly`.
- Server UTC time is converted to this timezone before comparison.
DogtagTradeSettings.- **true:** **토요일·일요일**에만 거래 가능 (해당 Time: - **true:** Trade only on **Saturday and Sunday** (based on TimeZone).
DogtagTradeSettings.- **주의:** `UseWeekendOnly`를 사용하려면 **반드시*: - **Note:** To use `UseWeekendOnly`, the following must all be true:
- If any condition fails, trade is always blocked.
DogtagTradeSettings.1. `UseDateRange`가 false면 날짜/주말 제한 없음: 1. If `UseDateRange` is false: No date/weekend restriction
DogtagTradeSettings.2. `UseDateRange`가 true면 `StartDate`와 `E: 2. If `UseDateRange` is true: Check `StartDate` and `EndDate` range
DogtagTradeSettings.3. `UseWeekendOnly`가 true면 위 범위 안에서 **토·: 3. If `UseWeekendOnly` is true: Within the range, **only weekends** allow trade

DogtagTradeSettings.**false:** 아이템의 `NeedDogtagAmount`만 사용합니: **false:** Only the item's `NeedDogtagAmount` is used. Attachments are not counted.
DogtagTradeSettings.**true:** 아이템 기본 가격에 부착물 가격을 더합니다. 부착물도: **true:** Attachment prices are added to the base item price. If attachments are registered in the trade item list, their `NeedDogtagAmount` is summed. Nested attachments (attachments on attachments) are also summed.
DogtagTradeSettings.예: M4A1 기본 10개, 스코프 2개, 탄창 1개 부착 시, true: Example: M4A1 base 10, scope 2, magazine 1 attached. With true, 13 dogtags total are required.

TradeConditions.`DogtagTradeSettings.json` 내부의 `TradeCon: The `TradeConditions` section inside `DogtagTradeSettings.json` defines **global trade conditions**.
TradeConditions.| 1 | 전역 거래 조건 활성화. 모든 아이템에 이 조건 적용 (단,: | 1 | Global trade conditions enabled. Applied to all items (except items with item-specific conditions) |
TradeConditions.| 0 | 전역 거래 조건 비활성화. 아이템 json에 `ItemTrad: | 0 | Global trade conditions disabled. Trade only possible when item JSON has `ItemTradeConditions.Enabled=1` |
TradeConditions.> **거래 가능 조건:** 전역 `Enabled` 또는 아이템 `Ite: > **Trade availability:** Trade is allowed when either global `Enabled` or item `ItemTradeConditions.Enabled` is 1. If both are 0, trade is blocked and "Trade Fail" notification appears.
TradeConditions.| `Enabled` | bool | 플레이어 독택으로 거래 허용 (1=: | `Enabled` | bool | Allow trade with player dogtags (1=allow, 0=disallow) |

TradeConditions.| `RequireSelfKill` | bool | 본인이 직접 죽인 독: | `RequireSelfKill` | bool | Only dogtags from player's own kills (1=own kills only, 0=anyone's kills allowed) |
TradeConditions.| `AllowSuicideDogtag` | bool | 자살로 얻은 독: | `AllowSuicideDogtag` | bool | Allow trade with suicide dogtags (1=allow, 0=exclude) |
TradeConditions.**NeedDeathWishDogtag:** 1이면 데스 위시 독택만 거: **NeedDeathWishDogtag:** If 1, only Death Wish dogtags can be used for trade. Normal player dogtags cannot. If 0, both normal and Death Wish dogtags can be used.
TradeConditions.**RequireSelfKill:** 1이면 본인이 직접 죽인 독택만 거: **RequireSelfKill:** If 1, only dogtags from the player's own kills can be used. Dogtags from players killed by others cannot. If 0, any dogtag can be used regardless of who killed.
TradeConditions.**AllowSuicideDogtag:** 1이면 자살로 얻은 독택도 거: **AllowSuicideDogtag:** If 1, suicide dogtags can be used for trade. If 0, suicide dogtags are excluded from trade.
TradeConditions.| `Enabled` | bool | AI 독택으로 거래 허용 (1=허용: | `Enabled` | bool | Allow trade with AI dogtags (1=allow, 0=disallow) |
TradeConditions.| `RequireSelfKill` | bool | 본인이 직접 죽인 A: | `RequireSelfKill` | bool | Only AI dogtags from player's own kills (1=own kills only, 0=anyone's kills allowed) |
TradeConditions.**RequireSelfKill:** PlayerDogtag와 동일합니다: **RequireSelfKill:** Same as PlayerDogtag. If 1, only AI dogtags from own kills. If 0, any AI dogtag can be used.
TradeConditions.| 전역 Enabled | 아이템 ItemTradeConditions.E: | Global Enabled | Item ItemTradeConditions.Enabled | Applied Conditions |
TradeConditions.| 1 | 0 | 전역 TradeConditions (아이템에 별도 조건: | 1 | 0 | Global TradeConditions (items without item-specific conditions use global) |
TradeConditions.| 0 | 1 | 아이템 ItemTradeConditions (해당 아이: | 0 | 1 | Item ItemTradeConditions (only that item uses different conditions) |
TradeConditions.아이템에 `ItemTradeConditions`가 있고 `Enabled`: If an item has `ItemTradeConditions` with `Enabled` 1, that item ignores global settings and uses only its own PlayerDogtag and AIDogtag conditions.

ItemTradeConditions.각 **거래 아이템 JSON** 파일 내부에 `ItemTradeCondi: Add `ItemTradeConditions` inside each **trade item JSON** to apply **different trade conditions** for that item only.
ItemTradeConditions.| 1 | 이 아이템은 **전역 TradeConditions를 무시**하: | 1 | This item **ignores global TradeConditions** and uses the PlayerDogtag/AIDogtag below |
ItemTradeConditions.| 0 | 이 아이템은 전역 TradeConditions 사용 (Item: | 0 | This item uses global TradeConditions (same as no ItemTradeConditions) |
ItemTradeConditions.전역 `TradeConditions`의 `PlayerDogtag`, `A: Same structure as global `TradeConditions` PlayerDogtag and AIDogtag.
ItemTradeConditions.| `Enabled` | 해당 독택 타입 허용 여부 |: | `Enabled` | Whether to allow that dogtag type |
ItemTradeConditions.`ItemTradeConditions.Enabled`가 1인 아이템은 전: Items with `ItemTradeConditions.Enabled` 1 do not use global TradeConditions and only apply their own PlayerDogtag and AIDogtag conditions. For example, global can allow AI dogtags, but a specific M4A1 item can require Death Wish player dogtags only.
ItemTradeConditions.- M4A1은 **데스 위시 플레이어 독택 10개**로만 거래 가능: - M4A1 tradable only with **10 Death Wish player dogtags**
ItemTradeConditions.- **아이템 리스트:** 해당 아이템별로 필요한 독택 타입(일반/데스: - **Item list:** Shows required dogtag type (normal/Death Wish/AI) per item
ItemTradeConditions.- **선택 시:** 액션 패널의 독택 프리뷰와 인벤토리 독택 개수가 해: - **On selection:** Action panel dogtag preview and inventory dogtag count update to match item conditions

TradeItemList.| `ItemClassName` | string | ✓ | DayZ 아이: | `ItemClassName` | string | ✓ | DayZ item class name (e.g., AKM, M4A1) |
TradeItemList.| `CustomName` | string | | 표시 이름 (비우면 게: | `CustomName` | string | | Display name (empty = game default name) |
TradeItemList.**ItemClassName:** DayZ 게임 내 아이템 클래스명입니다: **ItemClassName:** DayZ in-game item class name. Invalid names prevent item creation.
TradeItemList.**CustomName:** 비우면 게임 기본 이름을 사용합니다. 값을: **CustomName:** Empty uses game default name. If set, shows in trade UI with this name.
TradeItemList.**NeedDogtagAmount:** 이 아이템 하나를 거래하는 데 필: **NeedDogtagAmount:** Dogtags required to trade for one of this item. If DogtagTradeSettings IncludeAttachmentsPrice is true, attachment prices are added here.
TradeItemList.**Attachments:** 이 아이템에 달릴 부착물 목록입니다. 부착: **Attachments:** Attachments to attach to this item. If attachments are in the trade item list and IncludeAttachmentsPrice is true, their prices are summed.
TradeItemList.**ItemTradeConditions:** 없거나 Enabled가 0이: **ItemTradeConditions:** If absent or Enabled is 0, global TradeConditions are used. If Enabled is 1, this item uses different trade conditions.
TradeItemList.부착물 안에 또 다른 부착물을 중첩할 수 있습니다. Assault Rif: Attachments can have attachments nested inside. Example: SCAR-L full config in Assault Rifle.json.
TradeItemList.`SCAR_Polymer_Buttstock_FDE`는 그 자체에 `Ret: `SCAR_Polymer_Buttstock_FDE` has two attachments: `Retractable_Buttstock` and `Cheek`. Attachments can be nested: attachment → attachment → … as needed.
TradeItemList.- **카테고리/서브카테고리** 이름은 폴더명과 JSON 파일명(확장자: - **Category/subcategory** names are determined by folder name and JSON filename (without extension).
TradeItemList.- `ItemTradeConditions`가 없거나 `Enabled: 0: - If `ItemTradeConditions` is absent or `Enabled: 0`, global `TradeConditions` are used.

DogtagLifetimeData.플레이어별 독택 생존 시간, 킬 수, 데스 위시 레벨 등을 **서버가 자: Runtime data file where the server **automatically saves** per-player dogtag survival time, kill count, Death Wish level, etc. This is **runtime data**, not a config file, so manual editing is not recommended.
DogtagLifetimeData.- **데스 위시 유지:** `KeepDeathWishOnDeath`가: - **Death Wish persistence:** When `KeepDeathWishOnDeath` is enabled, Death Wish level is restored on next respawn after death
DogtagLifetimeData.- **킬 카운트 유지:** `KeepKillCountsOnDeath`가: - **Kill count persistence:** When `KeepKillCountsOnDeath` is enabled, player/AI kill counts are applied to new dogtag on death
DogtagLifetimeData.- **초기화:** 모든 플레이어의 독택 정보를 초기화: - **Reset:** All players' dogtag info can be reset
DogtagLifetimeData.- 플레이어 사망 시 생성되는 독택에 이전 데이터를 적용: - Apply previous data to dogtag created on player death
DogtagLifetimeData.| `BloodType` | string | 혈액형 (O+, O-, A+: | `BloodType` | string | Blood type (O+, O-, A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, None) |
DogtagLifetimeData.- **자동 생성:** 서버가 플레이어 사망 또는 독택 생성 시 자동으로: - **Auto-generated:** Server automatically updates on player death or dogtag creation.
DogtagLifetimeData.- **최대 1000명:** 저장되는 플레이어 수는 최대 1000명이며,: - **Max 1000 players:** Up to 1000 players are stored. Older entries are removed when full, sorted by shortest survival time.
DogtagLifetimeData.- **수동 편집 비권장:** 잘못된 형식이나 데이터는 오동작을 유발할: - **Manual edit not recommended:** Invalid format or data may cause issues.
DogtagLifetimeData.- **Config vs Data:** `Config\\` 폴더는 설정,: - **Config vs Data:** `Config\` is for settings, `Data\` is for runtime data.
DogtagLifetimeData.**LifetimeSeconds:** 플레이어가 마지막으로 생존한 시간(: **LifetimeSeconds:** Player's last survival time in seconds. Survival time at death is stored.
DogtagLifetimeData.**TagType:** 다음 리스폰 시 생성될 독택 타입입니다. `SMP: **TagType:** Dogtag type to create on next respawn. Stored as `SMPZ_Dogtag_DeathWish_1` through `5`, or base dogtag type.
DogtagLifetimeData.**PlayerKillCount, AIKillCount:** KeepKi: **PlayerKillCount, AIKillCount:** Kill counts applied to new dogtag when KeepKillCountsOnDeath is true.
DogtagLifetimeData.**KeepDeathWishOnDeath 연동:** 이 값이 true면: **KeepDeathWishOnDeath integration:** When true, TagType, kill counts, etc. in DogtagLifetime.json persist after death and are applied to new dogtag on next respawn.
